name: Health Probe Agent
description: Autonomous background health monitoring agent that runs periodic checks every 5 minutes across 5 subsystems: Cosmos DB connectivity, API key expiry detection, memory store health, model sync status, and resilience subsystem integrity. Reports overall system status as healthy/degraded/critical with per-check latency and error details. Exposes results via /api/health/deep, /api/health/history, and /api/health/failures endpoints.

provider.organization: Bayer AG — LLM Council Agent Team

skills.name: Cosmos DB Connectivity Check
skills.description: Tests Azure Cosmos DB connection by performing a lightweight read operation against the conversations container. Reports latency, connection status, and error details if unreachable.
examples: Verify Cosmos DB is reachable and responding within acceptable latency

skills.name: API Key Expiry Detection
skills.description: Validates that the Bayer myGenAssist API key (OPENROUTER_API_KEY) is present and functional. Detects expired or revoked keys before they cause pipeline failures.

skills.name: Memory Store Health Check
skills.description: Verifies the 3-tier memory system (Semantic, Episodic, Procedural) backend is operational. Tests read/write capability to the memory Cosmos DB container or local JSON fallback.

skills.name: Model Sync Status Check
skills.description: Validates that the council model list is synchronized with the upstream myGenAssist API. Detects stale model configurations, removed models, or new models available for addition.

skills.name: Resilience Subsystem Check
skills.description: Tests the circuit breaker, retry, and fallback mechanisms in the resilience layer. Verifies that graceful degradation paths are functional for pipeline fault tolerance.
